Spotlight: Beaten 19l at Ffos Las (1m2f) three weeks ago but won in this grade at Wolverhampton (1m4f) in March and was placed on turf here (1m2f) two starts ago; a possible if back on song.

RaceName: Free Bets On attheraces.com Classified Stakes
Spotlight: Didn't show a great deal on the Flat for Jack Channon last year (unplaced all six runs) but came second in two juvenile hurdles for new stable in December; absent since January but still looks quite interesting in this basement grade on Flat return.

RaceName: Free Bets On attheraces.com Classified Stakes
Spotlight: Well beaten on latest Flat start in May (2m, turf) but has been placed in two AW handicaps here this year (1m4f/2m) and didn't run badly over hurdles last month; swaps cheekpieces for first-time visor; more appealing than most.

RaceName: Free Bets On attheraces.com Classified Stakes
Spotlight: Has 1-54 career strike-rate, the win gained over hurdles in 2022; this year's Flat handicap form is uninspiring but he'll appreciate this ease in grade and is worth a glance in the betting.

RaceName: Free Bets On attheraces.com Classified Stakes
OwnerName: Aura Racing, Dave Brown, Joe Lane
Spotlight: Soundly beaten in 1m Kempton handicap on Wednesday and now 0-12; unexposed over 1m4f but it's questionable whether the refitted cheekpieces will make much difference, and he remains difficult to enthuse over.

RaceName: Free Bets On attheraces.com Classified Stakes
Spotlight: Struggled on turf 12 days ago and remains without a win since September 2024 but this C&D suits him well and the pick of this year's form gives him each-way claims.

RaceName: Free Bets On attheraces.com Classified Stakes
Spotlight: Soundly beaten all four starts, most recently when 80-1 outsider in this grade at Ffos Las (1m2f, good) three weeks ago; needs first-time cheekpieces to have miraculous effect.

RaceName: Free Bets On attheraces.com Classified Stakes
Spotlight: Five-race maiden; looked suited by big hike up in trip when staying-on fifth of 13 in this grade at Windsor (11.4f, good to soft; first-time cheekpieces) on last month's seasonal debut but suffered heavy defeat in 1m4f Epsom handicap 12 days ago; needs to bounce back.

RaceName: Free Bets On attheraces.com Classified Stakes
Spotlight: Launched handicap career with two thirds off basment mark in April (9.4f/1m4f) and didn't run badly when fifth of eigth at Wolverhampton (1m4f) last month but needs to take a step forward to get a win on the board.

RaceName: Free Bets On attheraces.com Classified Stakes
Spotlight: Unexposed after only four runs but was in rear throughout and beaten over 15l when upped to 11.6f and fitted with cheekpieces (retained) for handicap debut here (turf) in May.

RaceName: Free Bets On attheraces.com Classified Stakes
Spotlight: Ex-Irish maiden who started off for new stable with two respectable runs; no match for easy winner when second in C&D selling handicap a week ago but has each-way claims again.

RaceName: Free Bets On attheraces.com Classified Stakes
Spotlight: Eight-race maiden; second in Wolverhampton handicap (9.4f) on seasonal debut in April and put two lesser efforts behind him when sixth there (8.6f) last month but needs to find something extra over this new trip; wore blinkers or cheekpieces for last five races but goes without headgear today.

RaceName: Fitzdares Handicap
Spotlight: Four-race maiden who was placed at Kempton (7f, AW) last summer; made little impact over that C&D on recent seasonal reappearance but this hike up in trip is an interesting move for her handicap debut, and the booking of Oisin Murphy adds further intrigue.

RaceName: Fitzdares Handicap
Spotlight: Absent since safely held in Sandown novice in April but made promising seasonal debut when third at Yarmouth (also 1m2f, good) a fortnight earlier and this well-bred filly is open to considerable improvement in handicaps.

RaceName: Fitzdares Handicap
Spotlight: Three-time AW winner (1m-1m2f) who returned to turf with creditable third in competitive Sandown handicap (1m, good) last month; competes off same mark here and could still have untapped potential over this longer trip; good chance.

RaceName: Fitzdares Handicap
Spotlight: Yet to make any significant further progress since winning nursery debut at Wolverhampton (9.4f, AW) in November but recent third of five here (11.4f, good to firm) was perfectly respectable and he may benefit from this drop back in trip.

RaceName: Fitzdares Handicap
Spotlight: Slightly disappointing when well-held fourth at Goodwood (1m4f, good) last month but held on gamely to make winning turf debut here (11.4f, good to firm) in May and might still have a bit more to offer if combination of drop back in trip and first-time cheekpieces aids her cause.
